reason: Chain-of-Thought is a foundational skill that improves reasoning and accuracy for all future questions. Spending my 1 SP now ensures I have this benefit immediately.
Unlocking pe_plan will provide a structured planning phase and a reflection call, which are essential for tackling higher-level challenges and ensuring accuracy.

Unlocking Reflection++ (pe_reflect) is the most strategic use of my current Skill Point. It provides a dedicated reflection call after my initial answer, significantly increasing the probability of correcting errors and preserving HP, which is vital for long-term survival in the dungeon.
